notes.en: As a support, [[character:diona]] is typically used for three things: Shielding, Healing, and [[element:cryo]] particle generation. Pairing Diona with [[element:cryo]] damage dealers such as [[character:kamisato-ayaka]], [[character:ganyu]], and [[character:eula]] allows you to funnel energy into them while providing them a shield. Weapons such as [[weapon:sacrificial-bow]] and [[weapon:favonius-warbow]] greatly increase her potential as a battery.
notes.fr: En tant que support, [[character:diona]] est généralement utilisée pour trois choses : le bouclier, les soins et la génération de particules [[element:cryo]]. Associer Diona à des personnages infligeant des dégâts [[element:cryo]] tels que [[character:kamisato-ayaka]], [[character:ganyu]] et [[character:eula]] vous permet de leur fournir de l'énergie tout en leur offrant un bouclier. Des armes telles que [[weapon:sacrificial-bow]] et [[weapon:favonius-warbow]] augmentent considérablement son potentiel en tant que batterie.
notes.it: Come supporto, Diona viene solitamente utilizzata per tre cose: scudo, cure e generazione di particelle [[element:cryo]]. Armi come [[weapon:sacrificial-bow]] ed [[weapon:favonius-warbow]] aumentano notevolmente il suo potenziale come batteria.

notes.en: [[character:diona]]'s [[ability:skill]] grants a [[element:cryo]] shield which allows cleansing. Every time you swap characters with the shield up, it applies [[element:cryo]]. This acts as a cleanse.
notes.fr: Le [[ability:skill]] de [[character:diona]] octroie un bouclier [[element:cryo]] qui permet de cleanse. Chaque fois que vous changez de personnage avec le bouclier actif, il applique [[element:cryo]]. Cela agit comme un cleanse.
notes.it: L'[[ability:skill]] di [[character:diona]] fornisce uno scudo [[element:cryo]] che permette di rimuovere eventuali aure dal personaggio attivo: ogni volta che passi ad un nuovo personaggio nel team, lo scudo applica [[element:cryo]].
